children.value:
import numpy as np

x0 = np.array([1, 1, 1])
x1 = np.array([1, 2, 3])
x2 = np.array([2, 8, 9])
X = np.array([x0, x1, x2]).T
beta = np.array([3, 5, 7]) # ń£¤Ńü«beta
y = X @ beta

# OLSµÄ©Õ«ÜķćÅ
beta_hat = np.linalg.inv(X.T @ X) @ (X.T @ y)
beta_hat.round(1)

╬▓^=(XTX)ŌłÆ1XTY=(XTX)ŌłÆ1XT(X╬▓+u)=(XTX)ŌłÆ1XTX╬▓+(XTX)ŌłÆ1XTu=╬▓+(XTX)ŌłÆ1XTu=╬▓+(1NXTX)ŌłÆ11NXTu\begin{align} \hat{\beta} &= (X^T X)^{-1} X^T Y\\ &= (X^T X)^{-1} X^T (X\beta + u)\\ &= (X^T X)^{-1} X^T X\beta + (X^T X)^{-1} X^T u\\ &= \beta + (X^T X)^{-1} X^T u\\ &= \beta + \left(\frac{1}{N} X^T X\right)^{-1} \frac{1}{N} X^T u \end{align}╬▓^ŌĆŗŌĆŗ=(XTX)ŌłÆ1XTY=(XTX)ŌłÆ1XT(X╬▓+u)=(XTX)ŌłÆ1XTX╬▓+(XTX)ŌłÆ1XTu=╬▓+(XTX)ŌłÆ1XTu=╬▓+(N1ŌĆŗXTX)ŌłÆ1N1ŌĆŗXTuŌĆŗŌĆŗ

CovŌüĪ(X,Y)=CovŌüĪ(X,╬▒+╬▓X+u)=CovŌüĪ(X,╬▒)ŌÅ¤Õ«ÜµĢ░Ńü©Ńü«Õģ▒ÕłåµĢŻŌåÆ0+╬▓CovŌüĪ(X,X)ŌÅ¤=VarŌüĪ(X)+CovŌüĪ(X,u)=╬▓VarŌüĪ(X)+CovŌüĪ(X,u)\begin{aligned} \operatorname{Cov}(X, Y) &= \operatorname{Cov}(X, \alpha + \beta X + u)\\ &= \underbrace{ \operatorname{Cov}(X, \alpha) }_{Õ«ÜµĢ░Ńü©Ńü«Õģ▒ÕłåµĢŻ ŌåÆ 0} + \beta \underbrace{ \operatorname{Cov}(X, X) }_{=\operatorname{Var}(X) } +\operatorname{Cov}(X, u) \\ &= \beta \operatorname{Var}(X) + \operatorname{Cov}(X, u)\\ \end{aligned}Cov(X,Y)ŌĆŗ=Cov(X,╬▒+╬▓X+u)=Õ«ÜµĢ░Ńü©Ńü«Õģ▒ÕłåµĢŻŌåÆ0Cov(X,╬▒)ŌĆŗŌĆŗ+╬▓=Var(X)Cov(X,X)ŌĆŗŌĆŗ+Cov(X,u)=╬▓Var(X)+Cov(X,u)ŌĆŗ
